parameters.name: Market
parameters.description: The market where the results come from. Typically, this is the country where the user is making the request from; however, it could be a different country if the user is not located in a country where Bing delivers results. The market must be in the form -. For example, en-US.

parameters.name: Safe Search
parameters.description: A filter used to filter results for adult content.

parameters.name: Count
parameters.description: The number of search results to return in the response. The actual number delivered may be less than requested.

parameters.name: Offset
parameters.description: The zero-based offset that indicates the number of search results to skip before returning results.
